description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 10 hrs 35 mins of coding time, averaging 4 hrs 8 mins per day. His work spanned 5 projects and was mostly in Java, with additional time in Other, Markdown, and TypeScript. No new GitHub commits, pull requests, or repositories were recorded in the data.
